overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking through shallow water in a lush tropical environment with ancient stone ruins. The character explores a serene flooded landscape with dense vegetation, clear water, and crumbling architectural remnants.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river with dense mangrove vegetation

events.description: ancient stone ruins become visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through shallow water, surveying the lush surroundings and distant ruins

entered.detail: tall green mangrove trees with hanging moss lining the riverbank
tall stone tower ruins of ancient civilization visible in the distance
clear shallow water revealing rocky riverbed beneath the surface

segments.scene_description: The character walks through clear shallow water alongside a dense mangrove forest. Ancient stone ruins become visible in the distance as the camera follows from behind, capturing the vibrant tropical environment and the mysterious architectural remnants ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded ancient ruins with barnacle-covered rocks

events.description: passing a large rock formation covered in purple barnacles and coral

agents.ego_description: continuing through the water, approaching ancient stone structures and navigating around obstacles

entered.detail: large rock formation covered in purple and white barnacles or coral-like growths

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the flooded area, the character passes between ancient stone ruins and a distinctive barnacle-covered rock formation. The mangrove forest recedes behind as the water becomes slightly muddier and the ruins grow more prominent.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow muddy riverbed approaching large central tree

events.description: approaching a large distinctive tree standing in the center of the water

agents.ego_description: walking through shallower water toward a large solitary tree, with cliffs visible in the background

entered.detail: large solitary tree with spreading canopy standing in the middle of the water
rocky cliff face with cascading waterfalls in the background

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a majestic large tree standing alone in the shallow water, with rocky cliffs and waterfalls visible in the distance. The ancient ruins fade into the background as the environment opens up to reveal more of the scenic landscape ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a lush tropical wetland that transitions from a dense mangrove forest into an expansive, scenic vista. It begins with the character wading through clear shallow water alongside thick mangroves, with ancient stone ruins appearing as distant silhouettes. As the camera moves deeper into the flooded area, the forest recedes and the water grows muddier, guiding the character between prominent architectural remnants and a barnacle-covered rock formation. The scene then opens up as the ruins fade into the background, leading toward a majestic lone tree standing in the shallows. Finally, the perspective expands to reveal a wide landscape featuring towering rocky cliffs and distant waterfalls.
